bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, and the opponent’s first offer gives me the minimum utility on every issue. I am targeting my maximum-utility bid while establishing my preferred anchor, especially on the high-weight issues issueA and issueB.

I am targeting very high utility because it is still extremely early (t=0.02), so there is little need to concede much yet. The opponent has only made a small concession, moving issueA from valueE to valueD while keeping everything else at valueE, so I will make a minimal concession on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues.

At t=0.04 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high utility bid while making only small concessions on low-weight issues. The opponent has improved only slightly from all valueE to issueA:valueD while keeping the rest at valueE, so their offers remain very low for me and do not justify major concessions yet. I will avoid repeating my prior exact bid by conceding a little on issueD and issueE while holding firm on the most important issues A, B, and C.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.94 rather than making major concessions. The opponent has only improved issueA while holding issueB–issueE at valueE, so I will keep my high-weight issues A/B/C at valueA and concede slightly further on a low-weight issue to avoid repeating my last exact bid.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.08 and the opponent’s offers remain low for me, only rising from about 0.20 to 0.38. Their concessions have focused on issueA or issueB while keeping issueC-D-E at valueE, so I will hold firm on the most important issues A/B/C and vary concessions on the lower-weight issues D/E without repeating my last exact bid.

I am targeting about 0.90 utility, since it is still very early and the opponent’s offers, while improving, are only up to roughly 0.46 utility for me. Their concessions have mainly appeared on high-weight issues A or B, but they still keep many values at valueE, so I will continue holding firm on A/B/C while conceding a low-weight issue further than my previous bid.

I am targeting about 0.90 utility, since it is still early at t=0.12 and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has improved isolated issues for me at different times, especially issueA or issueB, but their offers still keep most issues at low-utility values for me, so I will hold firm on high-weight issues A/B/C and only rotate concessions on lower-weight D/E to avoid repeating my last bid.

At t=0.14 it is still early, so I am targeting a high utility around 0.88 while making concessions mainly on low-weight issues. The opponent’s offers are inconsistent and not steadily improving for me, but they repeatedly push issueD toward valueE and have recently shown issueE: valueC, so I concede there while holding firm on high-weight issueA, issueB, and issueC.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.16, so there is no need to concede on the high-weight issues A, B, and C yet. The opponent’s valid offers have improved only modestly for me and still keep issueC at valueE, so I will make a small concession on low-weight issueE while holding firm on my most important issues.

At t=0.18 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making concessions mainly on my lowest-weight issues. The opponent’s offers remain low for me and especially push issueC/valueE, but they have shown some flexibility on issueA and issueD; I will hold firm on high-weight issueA and issueB and concede issueD/issueE to valueE.

I am targeting about 0.84 utility, since it is still early and the opponent has only recently improved to a 0.58-utility offer for me. Their bids suggest some willingness to concede on issueA and issueC, while they remain tough on issueB, so I will hold firm on high-weight issueA and issueB and vary concessions on lower-weight issues to avoid repeating my last bid.

I am targeting about 0.82 utility, keeping my highest-weight issues A and B at valueA while conceding mainly on lower-weight issueE and partially on C/D. At t=0.22 there is still no need to make a large concession, but the opponent has repeatedly signaled willingness to accept issueA=valueA and recently offered issueC=valueB / issueD=valueB-D, while still holding firm against me on issueB. This bid avoids repeating my previous exact offer and moves slightly toward the opponent on lower-priority dimensions.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.86 because we are only at t=0.24, so it is too early to make large concessions on my highest-weight issues. The opponent’s offers remain low for me and inconsistent, though they have sometimes offered valueA on issueA and valueB on issueC/issueE, so I am holding firm on issueA and issueB while conceding more on lower-weight issueD and partially on issueC/issueE.

I am targeting a still-strong utility of about 0.84, since it is only early-mid negotiation at t=0.26 and there is no need to concede heavily on my highest-weight issues yet. The opponent’s offers remain low for me overall, but they have shown some movement on issueA, issueB, issueD, and issueE; I am therefore holding firm on issueA and issueB while conceding more on lower-weight issueD and issueE and offering issueC at valueB.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.82, since it is only t=0.28 and there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent has repeatedly signaled interest in lower values on issueD/issueE and occasionally moved favorably on issueA, while remaining tough on issueB/issueC, so I am holding firm on the highest-weight issues A and B while conceding on lower-weight D/E and offering valueB on C.

I am targeting a utility around 0.78, making a measured concession from my last offer while still protecting the highest-weight issues A and B. At t=0.30 there is some pressure to move toward overlap, and the opponent has repeatedly signaled willingness on issueA but continues to push hard on issueB and lower values elsewhere, so I concede mainly on issueC and low-weight issues rather than giving up issueB.

I am targeting about 0.80 utility, since we are still in the early-mid stage and there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent’s offers remain low for me overall and are not steadily improving, though they seem to push hard on issueD/issueE and sometimes issueA/issueB; I will keep firm on high-weight issueA and issueB while using lower-weight issueD/issueE as concessions.

I am targeting a utility around 0.82, keeping firm on the high-weight issues A and B while conceding on lower/mid-weight issues C and D. At t=0.34 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s very low latest offer, and their history shows only partial concessions mainly on A, B, D, and E rather than a consistently improving pattern.

At t=0.36 I am still targeting a strong bid around 0.78 utility, since there is time left and the opponent’s offers to me remain much lower than my recent proposals. The opponent has repeatedly pushed valueE on issueB and issueC, but issueB is one of my highest-weight issues, so I hold firm there while conceding more on lower-weight issueD/issueE and moderately on issueC.

I targeted a utility around 0.76, conceding further on the lower-weight issueD and issueE while holding firm on the high-weight issueA and issueB. The opponent’s latest offer is their best so far for me, showing real concession on issueA, issueB, and issueC, but at t=0.38 it is still not late enough to accept their 0.64-level bid. This counter keeps movement toward their apparent preference for valueE on issueD/issueE while asking them to improve issueB.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.74, making a moderate concession at t=0.40 while still protecting the high-weight issues. The opponent’s offers have sometimes moved to issueA=valueA but remain very tough on issueB and often low on issueC/issueE, so I hold issueA and issueB at valueA while conceding mainly on lower or mid-weight issues. There are no opponent messages to factor in.

I am targeting a utility around 0.74, which is a meaningful concession from my early bids but still protects the high-weight issues A and B. At t=0.42 we are in the mid-game, so I am willing to concede more on lower/medium-weight issues, especially since the opponent repeatedly offers valueE on issueC and issueD and recently offered valueB on issueE. Their offers fluctuate but show some willingness to give me issueA at valueA, while issueB remains contested, so I will hold firm on those two most important issues.

I am targeting a utility around 0.74, which is a moderate mid-game concession while still protecting the high-weight issues issueA and issueB. The opponent’s offers have occasionally improved for me but remain well below my prior bids, with their latest offer worth only about 0.54 to me, so I am not ready to drop to their range yet. With no messages to consider, I am conceding mainly on lower-weight or already-contested issues to avoid repeating my last bid exactly.

I am targeting about 0.70 utility: a meaningful mid-game concession from my prior offers while still protecting the high-weight issues, especially issueA and mostly issueB. The opponent has repeatedly offered valueA on issueA but remains very tough on issueB and issueC, so I concede on lower/mid-weight issues and move issueB only to valueB rather than dropping further at t=0.46.

I am targeting a utility around 0.66: still protecting the high-weight issueA and issueB, while conceding heavily on lower/mid-weight issueC and issueD. At t=0.48 we are in the mid-game, so I should move toward bids resembling the opponent’s recent valid offers without dropping too far; their latest offer strongly signals interest in issueC=valueE and issueD=valueE, with no natural-language messages to alter that assessment.

I am targeting about 0.70 utility at the midpoint, conceding on lower-weight issues while holding issueA and issueB relatively strongly because they carry the most weight for me. The opponent’s latest valid offer improved to 0.50 for me and repeatedly includes issueA: valueA, so I keep that while moving close to their last bid on issueC, issueD, and issueE and only asking for a compromise on issueB.

At t=0.52 I am targeting about 0.70 utility: a meaningful mid-game concession from my maximum while still protecting the high-weight issues A and B. The opponent has repeatedly signaled willingness to give valueA on issueA and occasionally valueB/valueC on issueB, while they tend to hold issueC/D/E lower, so I concede more on the lower-weight and contested issues rather than dropping issueA/issueB too far.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.68, conceding more than my earlier bids but still protecting my highest-weight issueA and keeping reasonable value on issueC. The opponent frequently pushes issueB and issueC toward lower values for me, but has repeatedly conceded issueA to valueA, so I am moving issueB to valueC while preserving gains elsewhere. No opponent messages were provided, so I rely only on the offer pattern.

I targeted a mid-game utility around 0.66, conceding on lower-weight issueD and moderate issueC while keeping issueA and issueB relatively strong for me. The opponent’s offers show repeated willingness to set issueA to valueA at times and recent movement to issueB valueB, while they consistently seem to push issueC/issueD toward valueE, so this bid trades in those areas without dropping too far.

I am targeting about 0.70 utility, which is a meaningful concession from my best outcomes while still protecting the high-weight issues A and B. At t=0.58 there is some pressure to move toward bids the opponent has signaled, so I concede fully on low-weight issues D and E and partially on C; the opponent’s recent offers show willingness to give either issueA or issueB but not consistently both, so I am proposing a balanced middle-ground rather than repeating my last bid.
